PowerShell(Write-Host "=== Kill zombie process on port 8001 ==="; Get-Process -Id 25808,9516 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_.Id -Force; Write-Host "Killed PID $\($_.Id\) \($\($_.Name\)\)" } catch { Write-Host "Could not kill $\($_.Id\): $_" } }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; $still = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($still\) { Write-Host "STILL BOUND - trying broader kill"; Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Id -ne $PID } | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } else { Write-Host "Port 8001 freed" })
